title: Working Paper FAQ
description: Governed schema for a FAQ artifact produced by the working_paper_engine. Contains frequently asked or expected questions drawn from study inputs, with section references and source traceability.

faq_artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this FAQ artifact.

source_bundle_id.description: The working paper bundle artifact ID this FAQ is derived from.

section_ref.description: Working paper section ID this FAQ item maps to.

answer.description: Optional answer text. Omit or leave empty if answer is not yet available.

source_refs.description: References to source artifacts supporting this FAQ item.

source_artifact_id.description: Optional: ID of the specific source artifact where this question originated.

source_locator.description: Optional: locator within source (e.g., page, paragraph, speaker turn).

confidence.description: Optional: confidence that this is a genuine stakeholder question.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of FAQ artifact creation.

engine_version.description: Version of the working_paper_engine that produced this FAQ.

total_items.description: Total number of FAQ items in this artifact.
